# Research Notes

This directory holds durable research outputs produced by the Researcher agent.

Keep active notes at the top level using the existing filename pattern:

```text
<topic>-<YYYY-MM-DD>.md
```

Move older notes into `archive/YYYY-MM/` when they are no longer part of the
active working set. When you archive a note, update any in-repo references that
still point at the old path.

Do not change the write target for new research notes. New outputs still belong
in `.github/research/` first.

## Active working set

- [mcp-web-search-2026-04-28.md](./mcp-web-search-2026-04-28.md)
- [agent-scope-control-2026-05-01.md](./agent-scope-control-2026-05-01.md)
- [tool-search-model-support-2026-04-28.md](./tool-search-model-support-2026-04-28.md)

## Archive index

- [archive/2026-04/](./archive/2026-04/) stores older April 2026 notes, including the former top-level working notes on terminal instructions, the VS Code extension API, testing-agent behavior, plugin-generator planning, and Awesome Copilot research.
- [archive/README.md](./archive/README.md) documents the monthly archive convention.
